ddls:
CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the item (e.g., Small, Standard, Large) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "cost" INTEGER /* Cost of the item in gold pieces */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item and its effects */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the item (e.g., Healing, Equipment, Food) */,
  "rarity" TEXT /* Rarity of the item (e.g., Common, Rare, Epic) */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL to the item's icon for visual representation */,
  "is_stackable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the item can be stacked in the inventory */,
  "max_stack_size" INTEGER /* Maximum number of items that can be stacked together */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item the property belongs to */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., Heal Bonus, Light Radius) */,
  "property_value" TEXT /* Value of the property (e.g., +5, 60 feet) */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Heal, Damage, Defense) */,
  "is_modifiable" INTEGER /* Indicate if the property can be modified by other items or effects */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_item_properties_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the player's account */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Amount of gold the player has */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the player account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Total experience points earned by the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the inventory belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "equipped" INTEGER /* Indicate if the item is currently equipped by the player */,
  "acquired_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the item was acquired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_inventory_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the shop */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the shop owner */,
  "opened_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the shop was opened */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicate if the shop is currently open */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shop_inventory" (
  "shop_inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop inventory entry */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop the inventory belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in the inventory */,
  "price" INTEGER /* Price of the item in gold pieces */,
  "restock_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next restock */,
  "restock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items to be restocked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_inventory_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shop_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crafting_recipes" (
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recipe */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the recipe */,
  "crafting_time" INTEGER /* Time required to craft the item (in minutes) */,
  "required_skill" TEXT /* Skill required to craft the item */,
  "required_skill_level" INTEGER /* Minimum skill level required to craft the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each requirement */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe the requirement belongs to */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item required */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item required */,
  "is_consumed" INTEGER /* Indicate if the item is consumed during the crafting process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_requirements_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_requirements_recipe_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipe_id") REFERENCES crafting_recipes ("recipe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characters" (
  "character_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each character */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the character belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the character */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the character */,
  "attributes" TEXT /* Attributes of the character (e.g., Strength, Intelligence) */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the character (e.g., Warrior, Mage) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character (e.g., Human, Elf) */,
  "background" TEXT /* Background story of the character */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the character was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("character_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
